turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, my dishwasher is acting up.
Got it — a dishwasher. What's the brand and model, and what's happening?
Thanks. Can you tell me more about what's happening and when it started?
Dishes come out with a cloudy film on them, the last few times.
Understood, and any error codes or unusual sounds?
No error code or unusual sound, just that.
Here's what I'd try: double check the dishwasher isn't overloaded and the settings match the load, then run a quick cycle to confirm the fix worked.
Happy to help — call back anytime if it's still acting up!

symptoms.description: dishes come out with a cloudy film on them

steps_given: Double check the dishwasher isn't overloaded and the settings match the load.
Run a quick diagnostic cycle to confirm the fix worked.
